title: CurvedORJuhlFormula
summary: Composes FormalJuhlStatement with ORBridge to obtain the final formal curved OR–Juhl equality.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Composes FormalJuhlStatement with ORBridge to obtain the final formal curved OR–Juhl equality.

mathematicalContent.heading: How to read the translation
mathematicalContent.body: The correspondence below follows Juhlformula/Juhlcombinatorics/CurvedORJuhlFormula.lean declaration by declaration. A definition is translated by its defining expression, a theorem by its quantified proposition, and a structure, class, or inductive type by the mathematical data encoded in its fields or constructors. The original Lean signature remains visible beside every translation.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal curved OR Juhl-type formula at order N. This states that the obstruction-side operator formalP N agrees with an OR-side RHS, through a formal Juhl RHS and a bridge. Its mathematical data are: juhl Statement: Formal Juhl Statement N; bridge: ORBridge; bridge matches: bridge.juhl RHS equals juhl Statement.rhs.
The OR side of a formal curved OR Juhl-type formula. In explicit terms, for n in the natural numbers, and f of type curved orjuhl type formula n, its defining expression is F.bridge.or RHS.to Expr.
correspondence.leanType: def orSide {N : ℕ} (F : CurvedORJuhlTypeFormula N) : FormalExpr

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The formal curved OR Juhl-type identity. In symbols, the proposition is the statement displayed below.
correspondence.leanType: theorem formula {N : ℕ} (F : CurvedORJuhlTypeFormula N) : FormalEq (formalP N) F.orSide

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The order-one curved OR Juhl formula, with the identity bridge. In explicit terms, its defining expression is juhl Statement : equals formal Juhl Statement one bridge : equals ORBridge.refl formal Juhl Statement one.rhs bridge matches : equals rfl.
Formal Eq formal P 1 curved ORJuhl Formula one.or Side.

The order-two curved OR Juhl formula, with the raw P_4 identity bridge. In explicit terms, its defining expression is juhl Statement : equals formal Juhl Statement two raw bridge : equals ORBridge.refl formal Juhl Statement two raw.rhs bridge matches : equals rfl.
Formal Eq formal P 2 curved ORJuhl Formula two raw.or Side.

limitations: This file establishes syntax, aggregate imports, or an abstract bridge. It must not be read as a derivation of the corresponding geometric theorem from concrete tensor and analytic data.
